images.prompt: A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a beautiful adult Japanese idol‑style model, 20‑something, flawless yet realistic skin with subtle pores and faint vellus hair, expressive dark eyes, a cute yet seductive smile, and straight silky black hair falling past her shoulders. She stands under a cascading cherry blossom tree on a sun‑kissed beach, the ocean behind her glistening in golden hour light. She wears an oversized boyfriend shirt in crisp white cotton, the garment slipping off one shoulder and unbuttoned just enough to reveal a sleek black silk bikini top and high‑cut swim briefs that accentuate her curvy silhouette. A playful wink catches the warm, candlelight glow that bathes her in a soft amber halo, while gentle bokeh from the f/1.4 85mm GM lens blurs the pastel blossoms and distant waves. The scene is vibrant, joyful, and radiant, rendered with cinematic Monochrome red color grading, shot on Sony A7R IV, 85 mm f/1.4 GM — a global illumination, ray‑traced masterpiece that feels like a candid, fan‑friendly moment frozen in time.8k photo, Large breasts
